name: Adventure or Normality?
short_description: “Adventure or Normality?” is the sequel/soft reboot to “Les 4 Alice: Lorange Journey”. Alice Lorange is an autistic teenager.
detailed_description:
“Adventure or Normality?” is the sequel/soft reboot to “Les 4 Alice: Lorange Journey”.

Alice Lorange is an autistic teenager. After the worlds had collided, the reality rewritten, and a new timeline had begun, a strange portal appears in her room Safety Zone. Will she take it, go on an adventure and meet the other Alice once again? Or will she remain home, with her old and, dare she says, painful life? YOU DECIDE!

Features
  • 6,364 words story, with "Paths" and 3 endings.
  • Some RPG-lite battles.
  • Achievements.
